sentence: This PTC Privacy Statement aims to explain what Personal Information is processed by PTC, who uses your Personal Information, for what purpose, for how long, and explains what rights you have in this context.
Who collects and processes your Personal Information?

PTC does, in the form of the respective legal entity, being either PTC Inc. of Boston Massachusetts or any another entity of the global group of PTC companies. The PTC Privacy Statement describes in detail which processing activities of which PTC group entity apply.
What Personal Information do we collect?
PTC may collect various types of Personal Information about you when conducting its business, including: personal contact information,
PTC may collect various types of Personal Information about you when conducting its business, including: Personal Information related to your or your employer’s business relationship with PTC,
PTC may collect various types of Personal Information about you when conducting its business, including: Personal Information PTC must collect due to legal- and compliance-related purposes,

PTC may collect various types of Personal Information about you when conducting its business, including: personal usage, registration, and participation information which PTC may generate through your use of its products and Services,
PTC may collect various types of Personal Information about you when conducting its business, including: special categories of Personal Information,
PTC may collect various types of Personal Information about you when conducting its business, including: application-related Personal Information,
PTC may collect various types of Personal Information about you when conducting its business, including: Personal Information which PTC may receive from third parties,

PTC may collect various types of Personal Information about you when conducting its business, including: Personal Information PTC requires to ensure your or your employer’s satisfaction with our current and future Services, products and offerings.

PTC may collect various types of Personal Information about you when conducting its business, including: Personal Information we may collect when you visit our facilities or attend events, either online or in person.
How we use your Personal Information?

PTC uses your Personal Information to: pursue its business relationships with you, your employer, or your employer’s customers, including ensuring your satisfaction with and keeping you up to date on the latest news about our products and services,
PTC uses your Personal Information to: develop and offer you, or your employer, its software products, cloud, SaaS and other Services,
PTC uses your Personal Information to: protect the quality and safety of its premises, facilities, products or Services infrastructure and data,
PTC uses your Personal Information to: secure and, if necessary, defend its protected assets against unlawful attacks, assert its rights or defend PTC against legal claims,
PTC uses your Personal Information to: ensure compliance with statutory laws and regulations,

PTC uses your Personal Information to: operate its websites, web offerings, or other online events including analyzing the behavior of the users on those websites, enabling you to create a user profile, benefit from an identity service such as single-sign-on and to promote and continuously improve the user experience,
PTC uses your Personal Information to: search you as a potential talent for PTC,
PTC uses your Personal Information to: transfer it to recipients like other PTC Affiliates, third-party service providers, PTC partners and others.

If you want to learn more about each of these purposes for which PTC may collect, transfer, and use your Personal Information, including for how long your Personal Information is being retained and, specific to the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the legal ground on which PTC is pursuing them and, specific to the California Consumer Privacy Act, the categories of Personal Information processed, please refer to the full PTC Privacy Statement below.
